1111101101101011 0011111101011011 1 -> sum: 0011101011000111, cout: 1
1110000101111011 1101101000111110 1 -> sum: 1011101110111010, cout: 1
1100000001000111 0111000101011001 0 -> sum: 0011000110100000, cout: 1
1111101111101111 1100101101110101 0 -> sum: 1100011101100100, cout: 1
0001000000111000 0001001001110001 1 -> sum: 0010001010101010, cout: 0
1000010001011010 0111100000111010 1 -> sum: 1111110010010101, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0

0111111111111111 1000000000000000 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
